assets.mechanism: Orally available biased small-molecule GLP-1 receptor agonism
assets.stageRaw: Phase 2 ACCESS/ACCESS II data; Phase 3 initiation planned for 2H 2026/Q3 2026
assets.description: Oral GLP-1 receptor agonist in development for obesity and overweight with weight-related comorbidity.
assets.notes: Company March 16, 2026 release reports Phase 2 ACCESS II data and says Phase 3 initiation remains on track for 2H 2026; normalized to Phase 2 because Phase 3 had not yet started.

assets.stageRaw: Initial data from Phase 1 study expected; ADA 2026 combination treatment presentation listed
assets.differentiator: Oral small-molecule amylin agonist with potential combination use with aleniglipron
assets.description: Next-generation oral amylin receptor agonist in Structure's metabolic franchise.
assets.notes: Included as incretin-adjacent obesity pipeline candidate. Source lists amylin receptor agonists ACCG-2671 and ACCG-3535 and an ADA 2026 presentation for aleniglipron plus ACCG-2671 combination in obese NHPs; exact clinical stage should be QA-checked.

extractionNotes: Small 01 screening pass limited to Structure Therapeutics.
Aleniglipron has strong company source support; ACCG-2671 is included as an adjacent obesity/amylin pipeline candidate and requires QA.
unresolvedQuestions: Confirm whether ACCG-2671 should remain in GLP-1 tracker scope as a standalone amylin agonist or only as a combination-relevant asset.
Confirm whether aleniglipron Type 2 diabetes should be represented as a separate candidate row once active stage is verified.
